superseded_evidence.reason: The original reports contained an author-specific absolute path and were not bound to EVAS 0.8.2 Rust per-case logs. They are not used for acceptance.

review_repairs.repair: Pass the observed row time to the strict shared event_label API so failure diagnostics cannot raise TypeError.
Add a reset pulse spanning a clock edge; the prior stimulus never asserted rst_n and allowed the ignore-reset mutation to survive.
Require four distinct codes, endpoint coverage, and three code transitions so a complete but unexcited trace fails explicitly.

reference_and_mutations.runtime_identity: every case log contains Version 0.8.2 and evas_engine = evas-rust

metamorphic.runtime_identity: every case log contains Version 0.8.2 and evas_engine = evas-rust

spectre.reason: The repository owner confirmed that this project does not have or require Spectre for this repair campaign.
spectre.policy: Do not claim or substitute Spectre evidence; acceptance uses Rust EVAS2.
